Metadata.title: MailToBills Dashboard
Metadata.description: Collect and export expense documents from one place.

System.convexInstructions: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL in apps/dashboard/.env.local and restart the development server.

Navigation.sidebarDescription: Primary navigation for the MailToBills dashboard.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Access your expense documents dashboard and keep PDFs organized.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: Create your MailToBills account in a couple of clicks.
Auth.heroTitle: Forward expense PDFs. We'll organize them.
Auth.heroDescription: Collect received expense documents by month and export the current primary PDFs with a CSV manifest for your accountant.
Auth.legal: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Auth.missingCredentials: Please enter both email and password.
Auth.oauthError: Unable to start the sign-in flow.
Auth.devAccountError: Failed to use the development account.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage how MailToBills collects Expense Documents and prepares Accountant Exports.

sections.forwardingDescription: Control which email addresses can send Expense Documents to your account.
sections.deliveryDescription: Send Accountant Exports directly or schedule monthly delivery on Pro.
sections.billingDescription: Plans and invoices for your MailToBills subscription.
sections.preferencesDescription: Choose how the dashboard looks and which language it uses.

forwarding.lockedTitle: Pro collects from every sender you actually use.
forwarding.lockedDescription: Keep your Primary Forwarding Address on Free, or upgrade to add business, personal, and assistant addresses without changing sign-in.
forwarding.unlocked: Additional Forwarding Addresses are unlocked for this Customer.

delivery.lockedTitle: Pro turns month-end handoff into a saved delivery route.
delivery.lockedDescription: Send Accountant Exports directly to the Accountant Address and schedule monthly delivery for the previous Collection Month.
delivery.directUnlocked: Direct Accountant Export sending is unlocked.

features.addressesDescription: Collect from more than the Primary Forwarding Address.
features.directDescription: Send the ZIP and Manifest to the Accountant Address.
features.scheduleDescription: Deliver the previous Collection Month automatically.

billing.upgradeConfirmed: Welcome to Pro. Direct send, Export Schedule, and Additional Forwarding Addresses are now unlocked.
billing.upgradePending: Checkout completed. Waiting for the Lemon Squeezy subscription webhook to confirm Pro access.
billing.proTitle: You are on the Pro Plan
billing.freeTitle: You are on the Free Plan
billing.pausedDescription: Update your payment method to resume Pro features.
billing.freeDescription: Manual ZIP download is included for free.
billing.paymentFailed: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep Pro features active.
billing.freePlanDescription: Unlimited collection, dashboard browsing, and manual Accountant Export ZIP download.
billing.proPlanDescription: Removes the repeated month-end handoff work.

preferences.languageHelp: Your choice is saved to your account and used on this device.
preferences.saveError: Could not save the language preference. Try again.

actions.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
actions.proRequired: Upgrade to Pro to change these settings.
actions.primaryAlreadyTrusted: The Primary Forwarding Address is already trusted.
actions.invalidAccountant: A valid Accountant Address is required.
actions.accountantRequired: A valid Accountant Address is required to enable the schedule.
actions.invalidDay: Choose an Export Schedule day from 1 to 28.

Error.title: Could not load this page
Error.description: MailToBills could not retrieve the latest data. Check the page before trying the action again.
